DP.166.0000:
Only the chosen may enter
the Snowpoint Temple.\f
I’m sorry, but you will have to
leave.\f
DP.166.0001:
Only the chosen may enter
the Snowpoint Temple.\f
I’m sorry, but you will have to
leave.
DP.166.0002:
The temple is said to have been
built in ancient times.\f
It pays homage to the Pokémon
of rock, ice, and steel that shape\r
the land.\f
So it is told.
DP.166.0003:
Candice: It’s OK!
You can let that person in.\f
DP.166.0004:
Cynthia sent word to me.\f
You’re working on a Pokédex,
aren’t you?\f
There should be many rare Pokémon
in the temple.\f
Enjoy your exploring!
DP.166.0005:
Brrr... This snowbound town is
always freezing cold.\f
But the spirits of the Trainers and
their Pokémon burn hot and bright.\f
Especially the Gym Leader.
DP.166.0006:
Ewww, aren’t you cold with just
that scarf? Yikes!
DP.166.0007:
You’re going to the Snowpoint Temple?
You know you’re not allowed to go in?
DP.166.0008:
You’re going to the Snowpoint Temple?
Some awesome Pokémon are there!
DP.166.0009:
Candice is teaching me about Pokémon.\f
She says I have to start by making
friends with Pokémon.
DP.166.0010:
What is it? Do you want to sail
to the Battle Zone?
DP.166.0011:
Aye, aye, then!
Let’s set sail!\f
DP.166.0012:
What is it?
The Battle Zone’s rough to get to.\f
The sea around it is always roiling
with choppy waves.\f
You can’t go there using Surf,
that’s for sure.
DP.166.0013:
A great Trainer recognized by
the Pokémon League...\f
I look forward to carrying someone
like that on this ship!
DP.166.0014:
There’s nothing here!
And that’s what makes us unique.
DP.166.0016:
Snowpoint City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Candice\r
The Diamond Dust Girl!
